title: Tobi's universe of Create
description: Minecraft Modpack which is all about the Mod Create
body:
# **Tobi's universe of Create**

 There are many custom recipes.
 

> 
<details>
<summary>CommunityBoosts</summary>

-    You become all 15 Min a coin You have to recraft it into a Diamond Coin (recipe see JEI [in the inventory on the right])

-    All Boosts require 5 Diamond coins


-    Speed   use /boostspeed and all players become Speed vor 15 Min
 
-    Haste   use /boosthaste and all players become Haste vor 15 Min

</details>

### _!!!ATTENTION!!!_ for Boost

When 1 player use a boost all players remove  the 5 coins (I'm trying to fix it)


## custom Blocks Items

1. Asphalt block (You can faster run on it)


## Custom Armor
1. Angel Amor you can fly like the creative modus - its funny

## Custom Spawner

 You can create Spawner Mechanical Spawner 

 serch in the Jei Mechanical Spawner hover over there and press "U"
 and you see witch mobs can be Spawned
## Infos
🔊  Voice-Chat
   - you can talk Ingame with the Voicechat mod
